rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually relevant to the citing paper’s mechanism-level argument: both involve post-failure/self-control processes, negative self-conscious emotions (e.g., guilt/shame/regret vs. self-evaluative feelings/guilt), and increased consumption behavior. Given this overlap in theory constructs (not just domain keywords) and a direct DOI match to the specific JMRK article, this is plausibly more than an incidental background mention and should be reviewed in full-text relation judgment.
